allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import radiomics; from radiomics.featureextractor import RadiomicsFeatureExtractor; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(RadiomicsFeatureExtractor.execute\); print\(src[:5000]\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== GET / ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8888/" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Write-Host "=== GET /api/volumes ==="; $vol = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8888/api/volumes" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $vol | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== --overlay-dir count \(should be 94, excluding .done\) ==="; \($vol = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8888/api/volumes" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json\); $vol.overlays.Count; Write-Host "=== First and last overlay name ==="; $vol.overlays[0]; $vol.overlays[-1])
